esp8266_sd_begin.message0: initialize SD card with default pins
esp8266_sd_begin.tooltip: Mount the SD filesystem using the board's default SPI pins

esp8266_sd_end.tooltip: Close and unmount the SD filesystem

esp8266_sd_file_exists.tooltip: Check whether a file or directory exists

esp8266_sd_open_file.tooltip: Legacy value block that opens a file

esp8266_sd_open_file_to.tooltip: Open a file into a File variable for stream operations

esp8266_sd_file_is_open.tooltip: Check whether the File object is valid

esp8266_sd_write_file.tooltip: Write text to an open file

esp8266_sd_read_file.tooltip: Read all remaining data as text; use bounded reads for large files

esp8266_sd_read_file_bytes.message0: read file %1 up to %2 text bytes
esp8266_sd_read_file_bytes.tooltip: Read a bounded text chunk from the current file position

esp8266_sd_read_byte.tooltip: Read one byte, returning -1 at end of file or on failure

esp8266_sd_peek_byte.tooltip: Return the next byte without advancing, or -1 at end of file

esp8266_sd_file_available_bytes.tooltip: Return the byte count from the current position to end of file

esp8266_sd_file_size.tooltip: Get the file size in bytes

esp8266_sd_seek_file.tooltip: Move the file position and return whether it succeeded

esp8266_sd_flush_file.tooltip: Flush written data to the underlying filesystem

esp8266_sd_write_file_quick.tooltip: Open, truncate, write, and close a file

esp8266_sd_read_file_quick.tooltip: Read a whole small text file and close it automatically

esp8266_sd_append_file.tooltip: Append text to the end of a file

esp8266_sd_rename_file.message0: rename file old path:%1 new path:%2
